---
title: "Projects"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<section class="editorial-page">
  <div class="editorial-page-head">
    <div class="editorial-page-index">/PROJECTS</div>
    <h1>Selected Projects</h1>
  </div>

  <section class="editorial-block">
    <div class="editorial-subhead">
      <div class="editorial-mini-index">01</div>
      <h2>Project Overview</h2>
    </div>
    <div class="editorial-body-copy">
      <p>
        This section presents selected academic and business-focused work that reflects analytical thinking, structured problem solving, and practical application.
      </p>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section class="editorial-grid editorial-grid-two">
    <article class="editorial-cell project-cell">
      <h3>Business Analysis Project</h3>
      <p><strong>Objective:</strong> Analyse a business issue using academic frameworks and structured interpretation.</p>
      <p><strong>Tools / Methods:</strong> Research, analysis, written evaluation, and visual presentation.</p>
      <p><strong>Outcome:</strong> Developed stronger analytical reasoning and clearer presentation of findings.</p>
    </article>

    <article class="editorial-cell project-cell">
      <h3>Data & Technical Learning</h3>
      <p><strong>Objective:</strong> Strengthen technical understanding through independent practice and coursework.</p>
      <p><strong>Tools / Methods:</strong> Excel, SQL, and digital learning platforms.</p>
      <p><strong>Outcome:</strong> Improved confidence in handling structured data tasks and technical learning.</p>
    </article>
  </section>

  <section class="editorial-grid editorial-grid-three">
    <article class="editorial-cell">
      <h3>Coursework</h3>
      <p>Academic assignments demonstrating structured business understanding and communication.</p>
    </article>
    <article class="editorial-cell">
      <h3>Practical Skills</h3>
      <p>Application of technical tools and digital platforms to strengthen employability and professional capability.</p>
    </article>
    <article class="editorial-cell">
      <h3>Professional Relevance</h3>
      <p>Project work that connects academic development with future career direction.</p>
    </article>
  </section>
</section>
```
